Description: Wing Chun academy with locations in Mount Lawley and Joondalup. Offers 5 session beginners introduction and 10 week intro programs. Address: Loftus Recreation Centre, Corner Loftus and Vincent Street, Leederville WA
Description: Traditional Iwama Ryu Aikido training at Loftus Recreation Centre, 3km from Perth CBD. Children's classes (6-11 years) and adult classes (11-60 years) available. Head instructor: Peter Sceney.

Address: Karrinyup Leave no Trace Scout Hall, 45 Huntriss Road, Karrinyup WA 6018
Description: Japanese Karate Association (JKA) affiliated dojo headed by Karin Prinsloo (6th Dan) and Graz Prinsloo (4th Dan). Offers traditional and sports karate balance. Classes include Dinky Karate (ages 3-5), Junior Karate (ages 5-12), Junior Youth & Adult (ages 13+), Intermediate Group (21+ years), and Senior Class. Free trial lessons available.

Specializes in training women, non-binary students, and LGBTQIA+ participants with trauma-informed and inclusive approach. Address: UWA Recreation & Fitness Centre, 35 Stirling Highway, Crawley WA
Description: Kendo training and competition preparation organization.
